column1: Visited Mahi Jewelleryes at Shop 141 Johri Bazar and was blown away by the kundan meena collection. The craftsmanship is exceptional and prices are very fair. Staff helped us pick the right bridal set without any pressure. Highly recommended for anyone shopping in Jaipur.

Found this gem of a store while exploring Johri Bazar. The silver polished jewellery sets here are stunning and the quality is far better than what you'd expect at these prices. The owner was knowledgeable and walked us through every piece patiently.

Bought a full bridal kundan set from here for my sister's wedding. Everything from the necklace to the earrings was perfectly finished. The antique gold plated finish looked absolutely royal. Will definitely come back for more pieces.

If you're looking for authentic Jaipur jewellery, this is the place. The variety is massive and the designs are genuinely traditional. Picked up a few Meenakari pendant sets and couldn't be happier with the purchase.

As a boutique owner, I've been sourcing jewellery from Johri Bazar for years. This store offers the best wholesale rates for imitation jewellery I've found. Quality is consistent and delivery is always on time.

The artificial diamond necklaces here are absolutely gorgeous. You'd never guess they aren't real at first glance. Excellent finishing and very reasonable pricing. Great stop for anyone visiting Jaipur Pink City jewellery market.

Stumbled upon Shop 141 while walking through Johri Bazar and ended up spending two hours inside. The collection of traditional Jhumkas and earrings is unmatched. The staff is friendly and never pushy.
Ordered customized jewellery for my wedding and the team delivered beyond expectations. The Jadau work was intricate and exactly what I had described. True artisans working here.
One of the most reliable jewellery vendors in Jaipur. I've placed multiple bulk orders and every single time the quality has been consistent. Great for boutiques looking for a dependable supplier.

The Victorian jewellery collection at this store is something else. Each piece feels like it has a story. The gold polished imitation jewellery looks premium and the prices are unbeatable for the finish you get.
Visited during my trip to Jaipur and made sure to stop at Johri Bazar. This shop had the most beautiful oxidized silver jewellery I've seen. Bought three sets and they all looked perfect back home.

The Meenakari work on the earrings I purchased is absolutely detailed. You can tell skilled artisans made these. Prices are fair and the owner shared some history about the craft too. Wonderful experience.
As someone who does bulk buying for resale, I found this to be one of the best wholesale jewellery market stops in Johri Bazar. Wide range, direct factory prices, and no compromise on quality.
The bridal choker sets here are heavy, well-crafted and absolutely stunning. I got mine for a traditional ceremony and received so many compliments. The kundan work is genuinely beautiful.

Great shopping experience at this Johri Bazar store. The staff took time to explain the difference between various types of Jaipur jewellery and helped me pick what suited my budget and style. Very professional.

I run a small jewellery business and this store has become my go-to source for latest jewellery designs 2026. Always fresh stock and the quality never disappoints. Best value wholesale supplier I've worked with.
The temple jewellery collection here is unlike anything I've found online. Heavy, detailed, and beautifully crafted. Bought a full set for a dance performance and it was perfect in every way.

Party wear imitation jewellery doesn't get better than this. The pieces are lightweight, stylish, and hold up well. I've bought from here twice now and both times the experience was smooth and satisfying.

Visited Mahi Jewelleryes with my mother and we spent nearly three hours looking at everything. The range of Jaipuri bangles was incredible. Ended up buying matching sets for both of us. Very happy with the purchase.

The gold polished jewellery here genuinely looks like fine gold. The finishing is so clean and the designs are elegant. Perfect for weddings or festive occasions. Staff was warm and accommodating throughout.

Found the best deal on a silver polished necklace set here. The design was traditional yet modern and the price was far below what we saw in malls. Johri Bazar is truly the best place for jewellery shopping in Jaipur.

If you want export quality Jaipur jewellery without export prices, this is your destination. The pieces are made to a high standard and the variety covers everything from daily wear to bridal collections.
Bought some designer pendant sets as gifts and everyone loved them. The packaging was neat and the jewellery itself looked high end. Would absolutely recommend this shop to anyone visiting Jaipur.

This store has a huge variety of designs that cater to all tastes. Whether you like modern or traditional, there's something for everyone. Friendly staff and original Jaipur handwork make this a must-visit.

I was looking for affordable bridal Kundan sets and this place came highly recommended. It did not disappoint. Beautiful craftsmanship, great staff, and prices that don't break the bank. A truly trustworthy jeweller in Jaipur.
The artificial diamond necklaces here are so well made that my relatives thought they were real stones. The setting and the metal finish are both top notch. Very impressed with the overall quality.
Bought a heavy Meenakari set for my cousin's wedding function and it looked absolutely stunning on her. The colors were vibrant and the finish was flawless. Will definitely order again.
Shop 141 in Johri Bazar is a hidden treasure. The range of oxidized silver jewellery alone is worth the trip. Prices are fair, staff is helpful, and the quality of each piece is excellent.
As a fashion designer, I appreciate the modern and traditional fusion designs available here. These pieces complement both ethnic and western outfits. Great for styling shoots and events.

First time visiting Johri Bazar and this store was recommended by our hotel. Picked up a complete bridal jewellery set and couldn't be more satisfied. The kundan work was exquisite and the staff was very professional.

The daily wear artificial jewellery collection here is perfect for those who want stylish pieces without worrying about damage. Lightweight, well finished, and very affordable. Will come back for more.
Purchased a set of traditional Jhumkas and a matching necklace. The quality was far better than expected and the design was exactly what I was looking for. Highly recommend this Johri Bazar shop.
We've been buying wedding jewellery for three family functions from this store now. Each time the quality, service, and pricing have been consistent. That kind of reliability is rare and valuable.
The Jadau jewellery collection here reflects true Rajasthani heritage. Each piece is handcrafted with great attention to detail. If you want authentic traditional jewellery, this is the right place.

Visited as a first-time buyer and left as a loyal customer. The staff explained every product clearly and helped me choose within my budget. The superior finishing and polish on every piece was impressive.
The designer Meenakari work on the pieces here is breathtaking. Each earring and necklace is like a tiny work of art. Worth every rupee and the staff made the whole experience very pleasant.
Bought some party wear imitation jewellery for a bachelorette event. Everyone looked amazing and multiple people asked where we got the pieces. Definitely one of the top-rated jewellers in Jaipur.

The wholesale jewellery selection at this Johri Bazar store is massive. I placed a bulk order for my boutique and the pieces arrived well-packaged and in perfect condition. Very happy with the partnership.

I specifically came to Jaipur to shop at Johri Bazar for wedding jewellery. This shop at number 141 was the highlight of my trip. The bridal Kundan sets are stunning and well within a reasonable budget.
The antique gold plated jewellery here has a beautiful vintage feel. Each piece looks like it belongs in a museum but is also very wearable for functions and festivals. Great quality and finish.
Mahi Jewelleryes has a fantastic range of jewellery for every occasion. The staff greeted us warmly and the shop was well organized. Easy to browse and the prices were pleasantly surprising.
Came here specifically looking for silver polished jewellery sets for my trousseau. Found exactly what I needed and more. The designs are classic and the quality is top-notch. Very satisfied.
The wholesale jewellery market in Johri Bazar is famous and this store lives up to that reputation. Competitive pricing, wide selection, and genuinely helpful staff. Will be ordering regularly.

The temple jewellery wholesaler section had pieces that were perfect for classical dance performances. Heavy, authentic, and beautifully detailed. The staff was knowledgeable about the craft and traditions.
Visited on a recommendation from a friend and I now understand why she raves about this place. The Jaipuri bangle collection alone is worth the visit. Bought four sets and the price was very fair.
Every piece in this shop shows excellent craftsmanship. The kundan and meena work is done with precision and the gold polish is clean and durable. One of the finest jewellery stores I've visited.

Came here for my pre-wedding photoshoot jewellery and found stunning pieces that photographed beautifully. The artificial diamond pieces looked incredibly real on camera. Very pleased with everything.

The staff at this Johri Bazar store were incredibly patient while I kept changing my mind. They showed me dozens of options without any frustration. That kind of service is truly rare. Will return for sure.
Ordered a customized bridal set and the team was very responsive throughout the process. The final product matched my vision perfectly. Great experience with customized jewellery manufacturing here.

This store is a must-visit if you're in Jaipur and looking for authentic handcrafted jewellery. The range covers everything from daily wear pieces to elaborate bridal sets. Fair prices and lovely staff.

The Meenakari pendant sets here are so vibrant and detailed. Bought three as gifts and everyone was delighted. The packaging was also neat which made it feel very presentable. Great overall experience.
Looking for a reliable jewellery wholesaler for boutiques? This is the one. Consistent quality, good communication, and prices that allow healthy margins. Very professional operation.

The variety at this shop is genuinely impressive. From lightweight daily wear to heavy bridal collections, they have it all. The staff helped me pick the right pieces for different occasions without upselling.
Bought a designer choker set from here for a wedding and got so many compliments. The kundan detailing was very well done and the overall finish was premium. Highly satisfied customer.
One of the best stops in the Jaipur Pink City jewellery market. The shop is well-stocked, the staff is knowledgeable, and the pricing is fair. A truly enjoyable jewellery shopping experience.
I'm a regular buyer here for my small online jewellery business. The pieces are always high quality and the latest designs keep my customers happy. Unbeatable wholesale prices and great support.
The oxidized jewellery collection here is one of the best I've come across. Each piece has a rustic, handcrafted feel that is very on-trend. Bought a full set and it exceeded my expectations.
First time buying bridal jewellery and the staff made the process so easy. They helped narrow down options based on my budget and style preferences. The final set was absolutely beautiful.
The artificial diamond necklaces here look stunning under lights. Perfect for evening events and weddings. The quality of the setting is impressive and the price is very reasonable for what you get.
Visited from Mumbai specifically to source jewellery from Johri Bazar. This store stood out for its range and quality. Bulk orders were handled smoothly and the pricing was excellent.
The gold polished imitation jewellery here is ideal for gifting. Beautiful designs, sturdy finish, and lovely packaging. Bought several sets for family and everyone loved their pieces.

I was pleasantly surprised by the level of detail in the Jadau jewellery here. Traditional craftsmanship at its best. The staff were very forthcoming about the making process which added to the experience.
One of the few places in Johri Bazar where you get direct factory prices jewellery without compromising on quality. Whether buying one piece or a hundred, the service is equally attentive.
The wedding jewellery collection here covers all styles and budgets. Found beautiful sets in kundan, meena, and gold polish. Very well curated and the staff offered great styling advice.
This store deserves its reputation as a top-rated jeweller in Jaipur. Every visit is a pleasant experience. The designs are fresh, the quality is reliable, and the pricing is always fair.
Bought a full Kundan meena set for my wedding and it was absolutely gorgeous. The colours were rich and the work was very precise. Received so many compliments on the day. Thank you.
The pearl and kundan combination sets here are elegant and very well priced. Perfect for formal occasions. The store has a great eye for design and the staff knows their product very well.
Shopping at this Johri Bazar store felt like exploring a treasure chest. New designs at every turn and the staff let me browse at my own pace without hovering. Very comfortable experience.
The silver jewellery collection here has a beautiful traditional character. Each piece feels handcrafted rather than mass produced. Prices are very fair and the quality is excellent for the range.
Purchased a set of heavy bridal earrings and a necklace for my function. Both pieces were well crafted and the gold polish was bright and even. Definitely worth visiting this shop in person.
The Meenakari bangles available here are among the finest I've seen. The enamel work is vibrant and the metal base is sturdy. Bought a dozen pairs and each one was consistently well made.
Came for daily wear jewellery and ended up buying pieces for three occasions. The variety pulled me in and the staff helped me make smart choices within my budget. Great experience overall.
The bridal kundan sets at this store are elaborate and beautifully finished. Perfect for brides who want the full traditional look. The weight and quality of the pieces felt premium throughout.
This is the go-to destination for anyone who wants authentic Jaipur jewellery without navigating the chaos of the market alone. The shop is well organized and the staff is very professional.
I run a wedding styling business and source most of my pieces from here. The collection is always updated with new designs and the quality is something clients consistently compliment me on.
Found the most gorgeous designer pendant sets here at prices I couldn't believe. The craftsmanship was exceptional and the gold polish was flawless. Will absolutely be returning on my next trip.
The antique jewellery pieces here feel genuinely vintage. The aged finish is beautifully done and the designs are rooted in traditional Rajasthani aesthetics. A truly authentic shopping experience.

Bought a full set of Jaipuri jewellery for a cultural event and it was a massive hit. The pieces were colourful, detailed, and very well made. This store knows how to balance tradition with wearability.
Tried several shops in Johri Bazar before settling here. The combination of quality, variety, and honest pricing made the decision easy. Bought more than I planned and have no regrets.

The staff here are genuinely helpful and not commission-driven. They suggest what suits you rather than what costs more. That honesty is what makes this one of the most trustworthy jewellers in Jaipur.

Ordered a bulk shipment for my boutique and everything arrived perfectly packaged. The quality matched the samples exactly. This is the kind of reliable jewellery manufacturer in Jaipur every retailer needs.
The rose gold polished pieces here are very on trend and beautifully made. Great for gifting or for personal use. The staff packed everything carefully and the whole experience was smooth.
Visited during the wedding season and the store was busy but the staff handled everyone with patience and efficiency. Found a stunning bridal set and the whole process was stress-free.
The imitation jewellery here passes for fine jewellery easily. The quality of polish and setting is genuinely high end. For brides on a budget, this place is an absolute blessing.
Picked up a few sets of oxidized silver jewellery for my ethnic wardrobe. Each piece is sturdy, well finished, and very stylish. The prices here are fair and the shop has a great selection.
The traditional Jadau pieces at this store carry the soul of Jaipur's jewellery heritage. Intricate work, beautiful colours, and a design language that feels timeless. Highly recommended.
Came here as part of a group tour and almost everyone in our group bought something. The store caters to all budgets and the staff managed the entire group professionally. Great experience.
If you want jewellery that looks expensive without the expense, this is your place. The finish on every piece is clean and the designs are stylish. Bought several sets and love them all.
The shop at 141 Johri Bazar is easy to find and well worth the visit. The range is wide, prices are honest, and the staff makes you feel welcome. One of the best jewellery experiences in Jaipur.
Bought a kundan choker set for my niece's engagement and she absolutely loved it. The work was precise and the overall look was royal. The store delivered exactly what was shown to us.
The Meenakari earrings here are a work of art. The enamel detailing is vibrant and the finish is very professional. Bought them as a gift and they were received with great appreciation.
Great shop for those who appreciate traditional Indian jewellery. The collection spans every style and the staff is knowledgeable enough to explain the history and craftsmanship behind each piece.
The designer jewellery here is a perfect blend of modern sensibility and traditional craft. Bought a few pieces for a fashion shoot and they photographed beautifully. Very impressed.
This is the kind of shop where you come for one thing and leave with five. The collection draws you in and the quality keeps you buying. Excellent overall experience at Johri Bazar.
Ordered matching jewellery sets for ten bridesmaids and the team handled it smoothly. All pieces were consistent in quality and delivered on time. Will definitely use this service again.
The party wear collection here is fun, bold, and very well priced. Perfect for destination weddings or festive events where you want to look great but don't want to risk expensive pieces.
Visited with a tight budget and still found beautiful pieces that looked high-end. The staff understood my constraints and showed me options thoughtfully. Excellent customer experience.
The Jaipur jewellery market is vast but this store stands out for its curation. Every piece feels selected with care. The range is broad but nothing feels filler. Quality throughout.
My wedding jewellery came from here and it was perfect. The bridal set was heavy, intricate, and exactly what I'd dreamed of. The price was also very reasonable for the quality delivered.
Bought temple jewellery for a classical performance and every piece was perfect for the stage. The gold polish was bright and the detailing was very authentic. Very happy with the purchase.
The shop is well stocked and easy to navigate. Found gifts for five people in under an hour. The staff was helpful without being pushy and every piece was beautifully finished.
Mahi Jewelleryes at Shop 141 is a must-visit for serious jewellery buyers. The combination of authentic craftsmanship, fair pricing, and excellent service is hard to find elsewhere in Jaipur.
The silver polished sets here have a beautiful contemporary feel while staying rooted in tradition. Bought a necklace and earring set and wear it regularly. Holds up very well over time.
Best value artificial jewellery I've ever purchased. The pieces look premium, the finish is clean, and the designs are current. Highly recommend for anyone looking for quality at fair prices.
The bangle collection at this Johri Bazar store is phenomenal. Lac bangles, Meenakari bangles, glass bangles with kundan work. Something for every taste and occasion. Great place.
Very impressed by the quality control at this store. Every piece I examined was consistently well finished with no rough edges or uneven polish. That attention to detail is commendable.

Came here on a friend's recommendation and bought a full bridal set. The experience was wonderful from start to finish. Friendly staff, beautiful pieces, and honest pricing. What more could you ask for.
The packaging here is also well done. Bought some pieces as gifts and they came beautifully boxed. Made the gifting experience very special. Attention to even small details is impressive.
The antique gold finish jewellery here has a warm, rich look that suits Indian ethnic wear beautifully. Bought a full set for a festive occasion and received many compliments on the day.
Excellent place to buy jewellery in bulk for resale. The pieces are well crafted, consistently finished, and priced for good retail margins. A genuine find for small business owners.
The designer pendant sets here are perfect for pairing with both Indian and fusion outfits. The designs are creative and the finish is very clean. Bought three and will be back for more.
The craftsmanship on the kundan pieces is what sets this store apart. It's clear that skilled hands made each piece. The work is precise and the overall effect is stunning.
Visited on a weekday and had the full attention of the staff. They showed me the latest collection and also suggested pieces based on my preferences. The personal service made it special.
The range of earrings here is incredible. From small studs to large traditional Jhumkas, they have it all. Each piece is well made and very fairly priced. Perfect for building a wardrobe.
My mother bought a full Kundan meena set here for my wedding and it was absolutely beautiful. The colour work was vibrant and the gold polish base was clean and even. Loved every piece.
The store has a real feel of authentic Jaipur craftsmanship. Nothing feels imported or generic. Everything has the character of traditional Rajasthani jewellery making. A truly special place.
Great for buying jewellery in small batches for events. The per-piece pricing is fair and the quality is well above what you'd expect from the price point. Will keep coming back.
The Meenakari collection here stands out for the quality of its enamel work. The colours are rich and the metal base is solid. These aren't delicate pieces that break easily. Durable and beautiful.
One of the best jewellery shopping experiences I've had. The store is well laid out, the staff is knowledgeable, and the prices are genuinely competitive. A great spot in Johri Bazar.
Bought matching sets for my entire family for a festive function. Everyone was delighted with their pieces. The consistency of quality across all items was very impressive. Highly recommend.
The gold plated jewellery here lasts longer than similar pieces I've bought elsewhere. The plating is thick and even, which means the colour holds up well with regular use. Great quality.
This shop had exactly the traditional Jaipur pieces I was looking for. The staff was patient while I browsed the entire collection. Ended up with a beautiful set that I absolutely love.
The Victoria jewellery section had some truly stunning pieces. Heavy, ornate, and beautifully finished. These are statement pieces that command attention at any event. Worth every rupee.
I appreciate that the staff here doesn't oversell. They give you honest opinions and help you pick what genuinely suits you. That kind of integrity is what makes customers return.
Bought the most gorgeous Kundan Meena necklace set for my best friend's wedding gift. She was absolutely thrilled. The craftsmanship and presentation both were top notch. Thank you.
The Johri Bazar area is full of jewellery shops but this one is exceptional for its consistency. Every visit delivers good products at fair prices. A reliable favourite for jewellery shopping.
The stone setting work on the artificial diamond pieces here is extremely precise. No loose stones and the finish around each stone is clean. Very high quality for the price point.
Came here for wholesale buying and was impressed by how smoothly the process was handled. Large orders were processed without any hassle. Delivery was prompt and everything was well packaged.
The traditional necklace sets here combine gold polish with kundan and meena work beautifully. The overall effect is regal and the quality is consistently high. A real showstopper collection.
Found the most unique designs here that I haven't seen anywhere else in the market. The creative team behind this collection clearly understands traditional craft and contemporary tastes.
The customer service at this shop is exceptional. The staff are warm, knowledgeable, and genuinely interested in helping you find the right piece. Makes the whole experience very enjoyable.
As a regular visitor to Jaipur, I always make time for this store. The collection is always fresh and the quality never disappoints. My go-to for traditional jewellery pieces without fail.
Bought a full bridal set here for my wedding and the pieces were breathtaking. The kundan and pearl combination was elegant and the gold polish base was perfectly even. Loved everything.
The daily wear pieces here are light, comfortable, and very stylish. They don't tarnish quickly and look great with both traditional and western outfits. Great value for money.
Visited during peak wedding season and despite the rush, the staff gave us their full attention. Helped us select the entire bridal jewellery set efficiently. Very professional team.
The Meenakari work quality at this store is noticeably superior to other shops I've visited in Johri Bazar. The enamel colours are bold and the metal work underneath is sturdy and clean.
For those who want to buy Jaipur jewellery directly from the source, this shop offers factory-level prices with retail quality service. Best of both worlds for savvy shoppers.
Bought heavy choker sets for a photoshoot and they looked absolutely stunning on camera. The pieces photographed beautifully and were comfortable to wear for extended periods. Great choice.
The lightweight festival pieces here are perfect for long days out. Beautiful designs that don't feel heavy on the neck or ears. Found exactly what I was looking for without much hunting.
This store is a dream for jewellery lovers. The sheer variety on display is overwhelming in the best way. Spent two hours here and still feel like I missed things. Will definitely return.
The kundan jewellery at this Johri Bazar shop is exceptional. The stone setting is precise, the backing work is clean, and the overall design is very authentic. A must buy for wedding season.
Ordered a custom piece based on a design I showed them and the result was perfect. They replicated it faithfully and added their own touches that made it even better. Highly skilled team.
The bulk jewellery options here are great for small retailers. Consistent quality, fair pricing, and a wide range means you can stock a full display from just this one source. Very convenient.
Every time I visit Jaipur, this store is on my itinerary. The collection is always updated and the staff remembers returning customers. That personal touch makes the experience special.
Bought my engagement jewellery here and every piece was perfect. The kundan work was intricate and the overall presentation of the set was beautifully done. Couldn't be happier.
The silver oxidized collection here has something for everyone. Small delicate pieces and large statement jewellery both sit comfortably in the range. Well priced and beautifully finished.
The quality of imitation jewellery at this store makes you question why anyone needs real gold. The pieces are stunning, durable, and far more affordable. Excellent work all around.
Bought several pieces from the latest jewellery designs 2026 collection. They were very current in style and beautifully crafted. Great to see a traditional store also keeping up with trends.
The staff helped me put together a complete look for my friend's wedding. From the necklace to the maang tikka, everything coordinated perfectly. That kind of styling help is invaluable.
The stone work on the artificial diamond pieces here is done with real care. No glue marks, no rough edges, and the stones sit perfectly level. Very high standard of finishing throughout.
This is genuinely one of the finest jewellery stores in Johri Bazar. The combination of traditional design, quality materials, and fair pricing sets it apart. Highly recommended to all.
Bought a designer Meenakari set here as a return gift for my wedding guests. Each piece was beautifully finished and came well packaged. Everyone asked where I sourced them from.
First visit to this shop and I'm already planning my next one. The range of kundan and meena jewellery is enormous and every piece tells a story. The staff brought that story to life.
The bridal jewellery options here cover every style from traditional Rajasthani to modern fusion. Whatever your aesthetic, you'll find something that resonates. Excellent collection overall.
I specifically look for original Jaipur handwork when shopping for jewellery and this store delivers exactly that. You can feel the craft in every piece. Nothing feels machine-made or generic.
The shop is easy to find in Johri Bazar and worth every minute of your time. The quality of the jewellery and the hospitality of the staff both make for a wonderful experience.
Bought a kundan necklace set for my mother's birthday and she was absolutely overjoyed. The craftsmanship was exquisite and the gold polish was bright and beautiful. Perfect gift choice.
The selection of heavy bridal choker sets here is among the best in the market. Tried on several and the fit and finish on all of them was excellent. Made my decision very difficult.
This store offers a fantastic mix of traditional and contemporary jewellery. Whether you want something classic or something trendy, the range here has you covered. Great place to shop.
Ordered a batch of party wear pieces for an event and everyone loved them. The designs were eye-catching and the quality held up well throughout the event. Very happy with the purchase.
The Jaipur Pink City jewellery market is famous for good reason and this store is a big part of that reputation. Authentic, well-made, and honestly priced jewellery in every style.
Visited with a first-time jewellery buyer and the staff were wonderfully patient in explaining the different types and crafts. Educational and enjoyable. Great approach to customer service.
The festival collection here is vibrant and varied. From deep colours in Meenakari to clean gold polish, there's something for every taste. Bought pieces for the whole family and loved everything.
This is by far the most recommended place among my family for jewellery in Jaipur. Multiple generations have shopped here and everyone has been satisfied. That legacy speaks volumes.
The earring collection alone makes this shop worth visiting. From simple studs to elaborate chandelier pieces, the range is extraordinary. Prices are fair and quality is excellent throughout.
Bought a full set of wedding jewellery from here and the experience was seamless. The staff was helpful, the selection was wide, and the final pieces were exactly as beautiful as they appeared.
The antique gold plated bangles here are absolutely stunning. Intricate work, beautiful design, and a finish that looks aged without looking worn. A very distinctive and beautiful collection.
Sourced temple jewellery for a dance school here and the pieces were ideal for performance use. Sturdy, bright, and authentic looking. The pricing for bulk orders was very reasonable too.
The traditional Jhumkas here come in so many sizes and styles that it took me ages to choose. The staff was very patient throughout. Eventually picked three pairs and love each of them.
Found the most beautiful kundan maang tikka here. The work was very detailed and the overall piece was elegant and well-balanced. Perfect for my wedding look. Very happy with it.
The shop has a warm, welcoming atmosphere that makes browsing a pleasure. The jewellery is displayed thoughtfully and the staff gives you space to explore while being available when needed.
The Meenakari necklace sets here feature some of the most vibrant colours I've seen. The enamel work is flawless and the pieces feel premium in the hand. Excellent craft and great prices.
Visited specifically to buy jewellery for a destination wedding in Rajasthan. This shop had everything we needed under one roof. The staff helped us plan the entire jewellery wardrobe efficiently.
The gold polished sets here are perfect for cultural performances and ceremonies. They catch the light beautifully and look stunning in photographs. Very high quality for the price paid.
Buying jewellery here was a genuinely pleasant experience. The staff were honest about quality and pricing, showed us various options, and never rushed us. That's the kind of service you remember.
The stone-set necklaces here have an elegance that belies their price. Each piece looks like it could have come from a high-end boutique. Excellent value and wonderful craftsmanship.
I've visited Johri Bazar many times over the years and this shop consistently delivers the best combination of quality and price. My first and last stop whenever I'm buying jewellery.
The Jadau jewellery collection here represents Jaipur's finest craft tradition. The uncut diamond look with coloured stones is stunning and the finishing on each piece is very precise.
Bought three sets of silver polished jewellery for my daughters and each piece was beautifully made. The designs were age appropriate and the quality was very good. Great shopping experience.
The bridal kundan sets here are show-stopping. The layered necklaces, large earrings, and heavy bangles all come together as a complete look that feels genuinely royal. Worth every rupee.
The customized order I placed was completed ahead of schedule and matched my brief exactly. The team communicated well throughout and the final product was stunning. Will order again soon.
The gold plated pieces here maintain their colour for a long time. I bought some over a year ago and they still look as good as new with regular care. That durability speaks to quality.
Visited during a family trip to Jaipur and everyone in the group bought something. The range catered to all ages and tastes. Wonderful shopping experience for the whole family.
The Meenakari pendant sets here are a beautiful way to add colour to any outfit. The enamel work is very precise and the metal work underneath is sturdy and well finished. Lovely pieces.
As someone who has been shopping in Johri Bazar for decades, I can say this store is among the best. Consistent quality, honest pricing, and a collection that never disappoints.
The lightweight jewellery collection here is perfect for everyday wear. Comfortable, stylish, and well-finished pieces that hold up over time. Bought several sets and wear them regularly.
The variety of styles available here is remarkable. From heavy traditional bridal sets to minimal everyday pieces, the range covers every need. Staff helped us navigate it all effortlessly.
The Jaipuri bangles at this shop come in every conceivable colour and style. Picked up matching sets for a group function and everyone looked coordinated and beautiful. Great selection.
Bought some beautiful oxidized silver pieces here. The finish was authentic and the weight of the metal was reassuringly solid. Prices were fair and the staff was genuinely helpful.
The jewellery here has that authentic Jaipur character that you just can't find in modern mall shops. The handcrafted quality and traditional designs make each piece feel truly special.
Staff were incredibly knowledgeable about the different jewellery types and helped me understand what I was buying. That expertise adds real value to the shopping experience here.
The wedding collection here is comprehensive. Found pieces for the bride, the bridesmaids, and the mother of the bride all in one place. Saved so much time and the quality was consistent.
Bought Kundan jewellery here for multiple occasions and every single piece has been beautiful. The craftwork is genuine and the finish is always clean and even. A truly reliable store.
The traditional temple jewellery pieces here are ideal for devotional occasions. Well crafted, bright, and very faithful to the original designs. Bought several pieces and loved them all.
